## Summary

Describe the change and why it belongs in this project.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test improvement
- [ ] Benchmark/reproducibility update
- [ ] Mechanism/API change

## Evidence

Commands run:

```bash

```

Results or screenshots:

## Research/benchmark impact

- [ ] No benchmark claims changed
- [ ] Benchmark claims changed and raw outputs are included
- [ ] Negative or mixed results are documented

## Checklist

- [ ] Code names remain mechanism-based and honest
- [ ] Tests/docs updated where needed
- [ ] `pytest` passes or failures are explained
- [ ] README/REPORT/paper source stay consistent with the change
